summary: Iteration 30 - All features tested and working. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (fixed auto_resolution NoneType bug). Frontend: Hot contests clickable, Admin Questions tab with pagination/edit/delete, Legal page with 6 points all working.

fixed_in_this_iteration.issue: AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'get' when question has null auto_resolution
fixed_in_this_iteration.fix: Changed auto_res = q.get('auto_resolution', {}) to auto_res = q.get('auto_resolution') or {} in admin.py lines 1545 and 1671

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 30 are working: 1) Hot contests clickable and navigate to match detail, 2) Admin Questions tab has pagination (778 questions, max 2000), Seed Pool button, Add button, Edit/Delete buttons, 3) Contest questions load properly with bilingual text, 4) Legal page shows 6 legal points with EN+HI text, 5) Auto-templates endpoint fixed for null auto_resolution. Login flow: Get Started -> phone -> Continue -> 4 PIN digits -> Verify PIN. Admin panel has Player View button to see homepage.

backend: GET /api/contests/{id}/questions - returns bilingual questions with question_text_en, question_text_hi, points, category, options
GET /api/admin/questions?page=1&limit=100 - returns paginated questions with total count and has_more
POST /api/admin/seed-question-pool - seeds question pool (778 questions, max 2000)
frontend: Hot contest circles clickable (data-testid=contest-story-0) - navigates to match detail page
Admin Questions tab shows pagination controls (data-testid=pagination)
Admin Questions tab has Seed Pool button (data-testid=seed-btn) and Add button (data-testid=add-question-btn)
Admin Questions tab edit button works (data-testid=edit-q-0) - opens edit modal with all fields
Admin Questions tab delete button present (data-testid=delete-q-0)
Legal page renders 6 legal points (data-testid=legal-section) with bilingual EN+HI text
IPL Points Table visible with team-colored rows
